task_title: Generate worker directives from canonical state
task_objective: Create a local deterministic helper that drafts .cockpit/handoff/worker-directive.md from canonical PCC state so the next worker cycle requires less manual handoff writing.
completion_criteria: A local helper script exists that drafts .cockpit/handoff/worker-directive.md from canonical repo truth.
The helper reads .cockpit/state/project-state.json and .cockpit/state/task-state.json as its primary inputs.
The generated directive includes the active task objective, boundaries, completion criteria, and required evidence in a worker-ready format.
The helper stays within the approved V1 scope and uses local deterministic logic.
Claude returns evidence in .cockpit/result/worker-result.md using the required format.

allowed: Update scripts/ for the directive-generation helper.
Update .cockpit runtime files only as needed for the helper.
Update docs directly related to the helper or handoff-generation workflow.
Add or update a small validation or demonstration step if needed.
forbidden: Do not build UI or broader application code yet.
Do not add paid API dependencies.
Do not introduce broad orchestration or automation.
Do not change canonical project goals or verification verdicts.
Do not require the owner to manually restate or carry the worker instructions.

required_evidence: Confirmation that forbidden scope was not touched.
next_action: Give the pcc-v1-004 directive to Claude Code and wait for evidence.
